news.title:
HEG and Graphite India surged 14% and 10% on price hikes by Graftech, despite a weak Sensex.
Rising raw material costs and EAF steel demand drive optimism, but profitability risks persist.
news.summary:
HEG and Graphite India surged 14% and 10% on price hikes by Graftech, despite a weak Sensex.
Rising raw material costs and EAF steel demand drive optimism, but profitability risks persist.

news.title:
HEG Ltd's ₹282.34 crore GST notice for FY 2019-20 was dropped, offering relief.
HEG shares rose 0.74% to ₹500.75; Q3 PAT surged 148% YoY to ₹207 crore.
news.summary:
HEG Ltd's ₹282.34 crore GST notice for FY 2019-20 was dropped, offering relief.
HEG shares rose 0.74% to ₹500.75; Q3 PAT surged 148% YoY to ₹207 crore.

news.title:
GST Authority withdraws ₹282.3 crore IGST refund notice against HEG for FY20.
The retraction is not expected to have any financial impact on HEG.
news.summary:
GST Authority withdraws ₹282.3 crore IGST refund notice against HEG for FY20.
The retraction is not expected to have any financial impact on HEG.

news.title:
HEG Ltd informs that GST authority dropped a show cause notice for FY 2019-20, proposing IGST recovery of Rs. 282.3 Cr.
The proceedings under Section 74 of MPGST and CGST Act 2017 were dropped based on available information.
news.summary:
HEG Ltd informs that GST authority dropped a show cause notice for FY 2019-20, proposing IGST recovery of Rs. 282.3 Cr.
The proceedings under Section 74 of MPGST and CGST Act 2017 were dropped based on available information.

news.title:
HEG plans a demerger, separating graphite electrodes into HEG Graphite and clean tech assets into HEG Greentech Limited.
HEG Greentech targets green steel demand, energy transition via lithium-ion anodes, BESS, and hydro power-backed growth.
news.summary:
HEG plans a demerger, separating graphite electrodes into HEG Graphite and clean tech assets into HEG Greentech Limited.
HEG Greentech targets green steel demand, energy transition via lithium-ion anodes, BESS, and hydro power-backed growth.

news.title:
HEG's Dec 2025 net sales rose 37.2% YoY to Rs 656.3 crore, net profit up 148.2% to Rs 207 crore.
HEG EPS improved to Rs 10.72 from Rs 4.32 YoY; shares gained 58.7% in 12 months, closing at Rs 564.75.
news.summary:
HEG's Dec 2025 net sales rose 37.2% YoY to Rs 656.3 crore, net profit up 148.2% to Rs 207 crore.
HEG EPS improved to Rs 10.72 from Rs 4.32 YoY; shares gained 58.7% in 12 months, closing at Rs 564.75.

news.title:
HEG partners with Inoxap to ensure nitrogen supply for TACC Limited.
Deal boosts carbon materials production at HEG's Dewas plant.
news.summary:
HEG partners with Inoxap to ensure nitrogen supply for TACC Limited.
Deal boosts carbon materials production at HEG's Dewas plant.

news.title:
HEG Ltd disclosed insider trading details per SEBI regulations, involving promoter group Redrose Vanijya LLP.
Redrose acquired 1.9L shares worth Rs. 10.1Cr, increasing holdings to 5.67Cr shares via NSE at Rs. 533.8/share.
news.summary:
HEG Ltd disclosed insider trading details per SEBI regulations, involving promoter group Redrose Vanijya LLP.
Redrose acquired 1.9L shares worth Rs. 10.1Cr, increasing holdings to 5.67Cr shares via NSE at Rs. 533.8/share.

news.title:
HEG expects stable margins until Q1 FY27 with no price hikes.
No price hikes are anticipated until Q2 FY27 for HEG.
news.summary:
HEG expects stable margins until Q1 FY27 with no price hikes.
No price hikes are anticipated until Q2 FY27 for HEG.

news.title: HEG Limited gets SEBI nod for its demerger plan.
news.summary: HEG Limited gets SEBI nod for its demerger plan.

news.title:
HEG Ltd reports strong growth with net profit of ₹207 crore in Q3 FY25, up 2.5x YoY, supported by 90% capacity utilization.
No price hikes are planned for H1 FY27; demerger and green tech listing expected by June 2026 alongside ₹650 crore capex for capacity expansion.
news.summary:
HEG Ltd reports strong growth with net profit of ₹207 crore in Q3 FY25, up 2.5x YoY, supported by 90% capacity utilization.
No price hikes are planned for H1 FY27; demerger and green tech listing expected by June 2026 alongside ₹650 crore capex for capacity expansion.

news.title:
HEG Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue of ₹656.33 Cr and PAT of ₹141.25 Cr, showcasing strong growth YoY.
HEG expanded its electrode capacity to 100,000 tons, aiming to reach 115,000 tons by 2027 amidst rising EAF steel demand.
news.summary:
HEG Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue of ₹656.33 Cr and PAT of ₹141.25 Cr, showcasing strong growth YoY.
HEG expanded its electrode capacity to 100,000 tons, aiming to reach 115,000 tons by 2027 amidst rising EAF steel demand.

news.title:
HEG Q3 profit surged 2.5x to ₹207 crore; revenue grew 37.2% YoY to ₹656.3 crore.
Board approved TACC credit guarantee, OCD allotment of ₹400 crore, and Bhilwara Infotech winding up.
news.summary:
HEG Q3 profit surged 2.5x to ₹207 crore; revenue grew 37.2% YoY to ₹656.3 crore.
Board approved TACC credit guarantee, OCD allotment of ₹400 crore, and Bhilwara Infotech winding up.

news.title:
HEG Q3 EBITDA rose to 1.4B INR from 810M INR YoY, showing strong growth.
EBITDA margin improved to 21.7% from 17% YoY, reflecting better profitability.
news.summary:
HEG Q3 EBITDA rose to 1.4B INR from 810M INR YoY, showing strong growth.
EBITDA margin improved to 21.7% from 17% YoY, reflecting better profitability.

news.title:
Promoters, DIIs, and FPIs raised stakes in Anand Rathi Wealth, Kajaria Ceramics, HEG, Ashapura Minechem, DCB Bank, Refex Industries, and Royal Orchid Hotels.
Anand Rathi Wealth showed strong returns; DCB Bank surged 36% in Q3 FY26 with 22% profit growth; other stocks had mixed performances.
news.summary:
Promoters, DIIs, and FPIs raised stakes in Anand Rathi Wealth, Kajaria Ceramics, HEG, Ashapura Minechem, DCB Bank, Refex Industries, and Royal Orchid Hotels.
Anand Rathi Wealth showed strong returns; DCB Bank surged 36% in Q3 FY26 with 22% profit growth; other stocks had mixed performances.

news.title:
HEG Ltd schedules Q3 FY26 earnings call on Feb 11, 2026, at 5 PM IST via SKP Securities.
Key executives including CMD Ravi Jhunjhunwala will discuss financial performance; invite details provided.
news.summary:
HEG Ltd schedules Q3 FY26 earnings call on Feb 11, 2026, at 5 PM IST via SKP Securities.
Key executives including CMD Ravi Jhunjhunwala will discuss financial performance; invite details provided.

news.title:
HEG Ltd disclosed changes in promoter group holdings under SEBI Insider Trading Regulations.
Promoters acquired and disposed shares; transactions notified to NSE on 17th Jan 2026.
news.summary:
HEG Ltd disclosed changes in promoter group holdings under SEBI Insider Trading Regulations.
Promoters acquired and disposed shares; transactions notified to NSE on 17th Jan 2026.

news.title:
HEG Ltd announces a Demerger Update Webinar on January 19, 2026, 4:00 PM IST.
Key executives from HEG Ltd and associated entities will participate; details on www.hegltd.com.
news.summary:
HEG Ltd announces a Demerger Update Webinar on January 19, 2026, 4:00 PM IST.
Key executives from HEG Ltd and associated entities will participate; details on www.hegltd.com.

news.title: HEG receives observation letters from BSE and NSE for its arrangement plan with HEG Graphite and Bhilwara Energy.
news.summary: HEG receives observation letters from BSE and NSE for its arrangement plan with HEG Graphite and Bhilwara Energy.

news.title:
HEG Ltd announces a one-on-one analyst/investor meet on 12th Jan 2026.
The physical meeting with Arihant Capital is subject to schedule changes.
news.summary:
HEG Ltd announces a one-on-one analyst/investor meet on 12th Jan 2026.
The physical meeting with Arihant Capital is subject to schedule changes.
